holdings.infoBox: EVUS is an equity ETF with a total of 224 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 7.44%, Meta Platforms at 3.54%, Micron Technology at 3.48%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.66%, and Intel at 1.79%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Aware MSCI USA Value ETF (EVUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Value Extended ESG Focus index. The fund is a passively managed fund that tracks an index of US value stocks with certain environmental, social, and governance criteria. The fund aims to maximize its ESG exposure. EVUS was launched on Jan 31, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Value Extended ESG Focus Index
